function c(c)return r[c+(21865-(-925))]end for c,Y in ipairs({{-619853+619854,147893+-145111},{-666050+666051,165381+-163570},{-708236+710048,-484538-(-487320)}})do while Y[939063+-939062]<Y[-879164-(-879166)]do
